cases.query: Resolve the user account for the email jordan@corp.com.

context.note: Harness should present the 4 identity tools in randomized order across runs; correct pick must be email-based regardless of position.

cases.rationale: Only get_user_by_email accepts an email. Tests that selection is driven by the id/email signal, not by which near-dup happens to appear first.

cases.query: I need the workspace membership metadata (seat type, join date) for member M-55.
cases.rationale: 'membership metadata / seat type' points uniquely to lookup_member even though get_user is the more prominent/canonical tool.
